subject: Project pulse: mainecoon execution in Canberra | Frida Kahlo | Q1 review | INIT-2497
body: Following yesterday's call, the mainecoon effort in Canberra needs prompt confirmation. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Prepare a fallback plan if integration testing slips beyond schedule. The retrospective section links this stream to lessons from Frida Kahlo and Alan Turing. Reference initiative INIT-2497. Please add your comments before tomorrow morning. Tracking tags: planning, ops.
